# Anwar Ali Sehar – Local SEO Expert & Digital Marketing Specialist

Professional portfolio of Anwar Ali Sehar, a Local SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist, AI Tool Builder, and Local Business Growth Mentor.

## Core Professional Roles
- SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist: Expert in online visibility and reach.
- AI Tool Builder: Custom tools integrating LLMs (Gemini, DeepSeek) into web apps.
- Web Developer: Mobile-responsive dashboards and software (HTML, CSS, JS, Python).

## Key Projects & Contributions
- Business Solutions: Digital Khata Ledger, Tailor Measurement Dashboard.
- Educational Systems: School Management System (records, fees, certificates), Pakistan School Board Age Verification System.
- Legal Tech: AI Advocate Assistant (drafting and case analysis).
- Portfolio Projects: King Hair Saloon, Hashbyt, Psychologist Portfolio, E-Commerce, Graphic Designer, Personal SEO Portfolio, DU Marketing Agency (du-marketing.blog).

## Mentorship & Community
- Local Business Growth Mentor: Training students and beginners in SEO and digital skills.

## AI Tools
- Legal Records Dashboard: markiting11.github.io/Haji
- Digital Khata: markiting11.github.io/Ledger
- Kurar School Software: markiting11.github.io/Kurar
- Voice-to-Text Converter: anwarvoice2text.netlify.app
- Student Question Solver
- Paper Composer AI
- Smart Paper Marker
- Geospatial Circle Generator: laptophp.netlify.app
- AI SEO Keyword Generator
- Maps Data Extractor
- Pakistan School Board Age Verification System: admission-age-checker-2026.vercel.app
